use_cases: Displaying security incident trends over time with multiple data series
Comparing Threat Intel, DLP, and SysLog incident volumes across time periods
Filtering chart data by predefined time ranges (7, 30, 90 days)
Real-time data visualization for security operations centers
ai_summary: A stacked area chart component for displaying time-series security incident data across multiple categories (Threat Intel, DLP, SysLog). Features time range filtering controls and generates random daily data for demonstration. Built with Reaviz charting library and uses gradient styling for visual differentiation between data series.
